## What does this PR do?

<!-- One paragraph summary of what was built or fixed -->

## Linked Issue

Closes #<issue-number>

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature or capability
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore` — build, config, or tooling change
- [ ] `spike` — research prototype (Architect only)

## Developer checklist

- [ ] All acceptance criteria on the linked issue are met
- [ ] Tests written and passing locally
- [ ] No credentials, API keys, or secrets anywhere in this diff
- [ ] No `any` types or `@ts-ignore` added without justification comment
- [ ] Relevant docs updated if behaviour changed

## Review routing

- [ ] **Architect review requested** — this PR touches API contracts, extraction interface, agent pipeline, security boundaries, or DB schema
- [ ] **PM review requested** — this PR touches UI screens, wizard content, recommendation card copy, or user-visible text
